purpose: Document the count methodology behind the Real Life Workflows README claim of a 19,000+ upstream-flow source universe.

count_method.curated_doors: Exact row count from the checked workflow search index.
count_method.source_repos: Exact unique source_repo count from the checked workflow search index.
count_method.direct_skill_or_agent_templates: Count of SKILL.md plus SOUL.md files across the indexed source repos.
count_method.workflow_json_templates: Count of .json files for the two template-heavy workflow repos.
count_method.headline_total: direct_skill_or_agent_templates + workflow_json_templates, rounded down to 19,000+ for product display.

claim_boundaries: The 171 rows are curated workflow doors, not 171 repositories.
The 19,000+ number is a source-universe estimate, not a claim that every upstream flow is deeply classified in this project.
Quarantined imported skills remain source evidence only and are not active callable Real Life Workflows skills.
